category_sources: source_facts.description says it gets, sets, and lists display resolution.
display_name_sources: Official repository URL in source_facts.homepage uses the same project name.
source_facts.name identifies the project as screenresolution.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-evaluated per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists the command-line executable screenresolution.
